explanation: The user wants to put an object (potato_2) into the same cabinet it is currently referenced in the state, which is cabinet_4. The state shows that cabinet_4 is already open and contains other items like fork, knife, and potatoes. The old plan successfully found potato_2 on the countertop. To complete the task, the robot must go to potato_2, pick it up, and place it into cabinet_4. Since the robot is not currently holding anything, it first needs to navigate to the object, then pick it up, and finally place it in the cabinet.
